sentences.target: Tu as une allumette, s’il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty a yn alymɛt sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu as une allumette, s’il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty a yn alymɛt sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Do you have a match, please?
translations.ar: هل لديك عود ثقاب، من فضلك؟

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; performs the action of 'as'.
Main verb in present indicative (2nd person singular); expresses possession; agrees with 'Tu'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner introducing 'allumette'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'as'.
Elided subordinating conjunction 'si' (if), introducing the conditional clause in the polite formula.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular; impersonal subject of 'plaît' in 's’il te plaît'.
Clitic pronoun, 2nd person singular; indirect object (to you) of 'plaît'.
Verb in present 3rd person singular; predicate of the subordinate clause; 'il' is subject and 'te' is dative complement.

sentences.target: Je cherche une allumette pour la bougie.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ yn alymɛt puʁ la buʒi/

translations.fr: Je cherche une allumette pour la bougie.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ yn alymɛt puʁ la buʒi/
translations.en: I'm looking for a match for the candle.
translations.es: Busco una cerilla para la vela.
translations.de: Ich suche ein Streichholz für die Kerze.
translations.it: Cerco un fiammifero per la candela.
translations.pt: Estou procurando um fósforo para a vela.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một que diêm để thắp nến.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een lucifer voor de kaars.
translations.hi: मैं मोमबत्ती के लिए माचिस ढूँढ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ψάχνω ένα σπίρτο για το κερί.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter en fyrstikk til stearinlyset.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari korek api untuk lilin.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter en tändsticka till ljuset.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter en tændstik til stearinlyset.
translations.ja: ろうそくに使うマッチを探している。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'cherche'.
Main verb in present indicative (1st person singular); governs the direct object 'une allumette'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'allumette'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition introducing a purpose complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'bougie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'pour' indicating purpose.

sentences.target: On n’a plus d’allumettes dans le tiroir.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ na ply dalymɛt dɑ̃ lə tiʁwaʁ/

translations.fr: On n’a plus d’allumettes dans le tiroir.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ na ply dalymɛt dɑ̃ lə tiʁwaʁ/
translations.en: We don’t have any matches left in the drawer.
translations.es: Ya no quedan cerillas en el cajón.
translations.de: In der Schublade sind keine Streichhölzer mehr.
translations.it: Non ci sono più fiammiferi nel cassetto.
translations.zh-Hans: 抽屉里已经没有火柴了。
translations.yue: 抽屜入面已經冇火柴喇。
translations.pt: Já não há fósforos na gaveta.
translations.vi: Trong ngăn kéo không còn que diêm nữa.
translations.ar: لم تعد هناك أعواد ثقاب في الدرج.
translations.nl: Er liggen geen lucifers meer in de lade.
translations.hu: A fiókban már nincs több gyufa.
translations.hi: दराज़ में अब माचिस नहीं बची है।
translations.pl: W szufladzie nie ma już zapałek.
translations.el: Στο συρτάρι δεν υπάρχουν πια σπίρτα.
translations.nb: Det er ikke flere fyrstikker i skuffen.
translations.id: Di laci sudah tidak ada korek api lagi.
translations.sv: Det finns inga tändstickor kvar i lådan.
translations.ro: Nu mai sunt chibrituri în sertar.
translations.cs: V zásuvce už nejsou žádné sirky.
translations.da: Der er ikke flere tændstikker i skuffen.
translations.ja: 引き出しにはもうマッチが残っていない。

tokens.explanation: Generic/colloquial subject pronoun; subject of 'a'.
Clitic negation particle; pairs with 'plus' to form the negative ('no longer').
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular with 'on'); expresses possession.
Adverb of negation meaning 'no longer'; completes 'n’'.
Elided preposition 'de' before vowel; introduces the noun 'allumettes'.
Common noun, feminine plural; complement of 'de' and logical object of 'a' in the negative quantity construction.
Preposition introducing the location complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'tiroir'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Fais attention avec l’allumette près du gaz.
sentences.reading: /fɛ atɑ̃sjɔ̃ avɛk lalymɛt pʁɛ dy ɡaz/

translations.fr: Fais attention avec l’allumette près du gaz.
translations.ipa: /fɛ atɑ̃sjɔ̃ avɛk lalymɛt pʁɛ dy ɡaz/
translations.en: Be careful with the match near the gas.
translations.es: Ten cuidado con la cerilla cerca del gas.
translations.de: Pass auf mit dem Streichholz am Gas.
translations.it: Stai attento con il fiammifero vicino al gas.
translations.zh-Hans: 在煤气附近用火柴要小心。
translations.yue: 喺煤氣爐附近用火柴要小心。
translations.ru: Осторожнее со спичкой рядом с газом.
translations.pt: Cuidado com o fósforo perto do gás.
translations.tr: Gazın yanında kibrit kullanırken dikkatli ol.
translations.vi: Cẩn thận với que diêm gần bếp ga.
translations.nl: Wees voorzichtig met de lucifer dicht bij het gas.
translations.hu: Vigyázz a gyufával a gáz közelében.
translations.hi: गैस के पास माचिस से सावधान रहो।
translations.el: Πρόσεχε με το σπίρτο κοντά στο γκάζι.
translations.nb: Vær forsiktig med fyrstikken nær gassen.
translations.id: Hati-hati dengan korek api di dekat gas.
translations.sv: Var försiktig med tändstickan nära gasen.
translations.ro: Ai grijă cu chibritul lângă gaz.
translations.cs: Dávej pozor na sirku u plynu.
translations.da: Pas på med tændstikken tæt på gassen.
translations.ja: ガスの近くでマッチに気をつけて。

tokens.explanation: Imperative, 2nd person singular; forms a command addressed to 'tu'.
Noun; direct object in the fixed expression 'faire attention' (be careful).
Preposition introducing an instrumental/comitative complement.
Elided definite article before a vowel-initial noun; determiner of 'allumette'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'avec'.
Adverb forming the prepositional locution 'près de' (near).
Contraction of 'de + le'; preposition introducing the noun complement 'gaz'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'du'.
